pollux vs castor is kind of hard to compare because they serve 2 different roles:
- OE pollux is one of, if not the highest damage character in the game, but he doesn't have much utility and being defensive on him requires giving up your burst turn to stack defenses instead. you want to go hyperaggressive dps with him because despite having a long-term infinite scaling option in his kit, his damage is so overwhelming that nothing in the game is going to survive to the point that you care too much about his extended scaling
- castor in general is one of, if not the best defensive character in the game, but e3 gives him offensive capabilities and OE ramps up everything he does plus speeds up your stacking significantly. his playstyle involves stalling with his defenses until you reach the the threshold needed to oneshot with him, so he's much more of a slower staller/defensive character that has slower, inevitable offensive scaling so you're just waiting to hit his breakpoint

basically both are good but in terms of OE, I would say pollux because e3 > OE on pollux is significantly bigger of an upgrade than e3 > OE on castor. e3 on castor will do most of the things an OE castor can do, just worse, whereas e3 pollux vs OE pollux is absolutely night and day and OE pollux can do a ton of things e3 pollux can't
